## Summary

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Parser improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Packaging or icon update
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri\Cargo.toml --release usage::tests -- --nocapture`
- [ ] Tauri build, if packaging changed
- [ ] Manual UI check, if UI changed

## Privacy And Safety

- [ ] This keeps Codex session files read-only.
- [ ] This does not commit private Codex session data.
- [ ] Screenshots, logs, and sample data are sanitized.

## Notes For Reviewers

Add risks, follow-up work, or compatibility notes here.
